org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation.DateOperators.DateFromParts

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation
Support for the MongoDB aggregation framework.

  • Uses of DateOperators.DateFromParts in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation

    Classes in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation that implement interfaces with type arguments of type DateOperators.DateFromParts
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    AggregationExpression for $dateFromParts.
    NOTE: Requires MongoDB 3.6 or later.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.aggregation that return DateOperators.DateFromParts
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.day(Object day)
    Set the day to the given value which must resolve to a calendar day in range 1 - 31.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.dayOf(String fieldReference)
    Set the day to the value resolved by following the given field reference.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.dayOf(AggregationExpression expression)
    Set the day to the result of the given expression.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.hour(Object hour)
     
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.millisecond(Object millisecond)
     
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.minute(Object minute)
     
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.month(Object month)
    Set the month to the given value which must resolve to a calendar month in range 1 - 12.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.monthOf(String fieldReference)
    Set the month to the value resolved by following the given field reference.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.monthOf(AggregationExpression expression)
    Set the month to the result of the given expression.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.second(Object second)
     
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.withTimezone(DateOperators.Timezone timezone)
    Optionally set the DateOperators.Timezone to use.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.DateFromPartsWithYear.year(Object year)
    Set the year to the given value which must resolve to a calendar year.
    DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromPartsOperatorFactory.year(Object year)
    Set the year to the given value which must resolve to a calendar year.
    default DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.DateFromPartsWithYear.yearOf(String fieldReference)
    Set the year to the value resolved by following the given field reference.
    default DateOperators.DateFromParts
    DateOperators.DateFromParts.DateFromPartsWithYear.yearOf(AggregationExpression expression)
    Set the year to the result of the given expression.
